title: Navigate Directly To Another HMI Screen Using The VISU_MANCONTROL Drop-Down Menu
summary: Use the drop-down menu on the VISU_MANCONTROL screen to directly select and open another HMI screen.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when working from the Operator Station HMI VISU_MANCONTROL screen and you need to directly open another HMI screen using the documented screen-selection drop-down menu.
not_for: Do not use this runbook to identify the full list of selectable screen names, because this source section does not enumerate them.
Do not use this runbook for navigation from HMI screens other than VISU_MANCONTROL unless separately supported by source evidence.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Navigate from the VISU_MANCONTROL screen using the screen-selection drop-down menu.

safety_notes: This runbook is source-supported as a screen navigation action only.
The VISU_MANCONTROL screen shown in the source is described as the screen seen by personnel logged in as maintenance.

access_required: Access to the Operator Station HMI
system_preconditions: The VISU_MANCONTROL screen is open on the Operator Station HMI.

external_references.quote_or_summary: The drop-down menu can be used to directly select the screen to view.

visual_references.description: VISU_MANCONTROL manual control screen showing the screen-selection drop-down on the Operator Station HMI.
Operator station display controls reference showing screen-navigation controls and drop-down menu usage.

steps.title: Open the VISU_MANCONTROL screen
steps.purpose: Start from the documented manual control screen that contains the direct screen-selection drop-down menu.
steps.instruction: Open the VISU_MANCONTROL screen on the Operator Station HMI.
steps.healthy_condition: The Operator Station HMI shows the VISU_MANCONTROL manual control screen.
steps.failure_condition: The VISU_MANCONTROL screen cannot be opened or is not available.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The VISU_MANCONTROL screen layout and the screen-selection drop-down menu shown on the manual control screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the VISU_MANCONTROL screen is not available as documented.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Figure 4-23 is the Operator Station HMI Manual Control Screen; the screen shown is what personnel logged in as maintenance will see.

steps.title: Locate the screen-selection drop-down menu
steps.purpose: Identify the documented control used for direct screen navigation.
steps.instruction: Locate the drop-down menu on the VISU_MANCONTROL screen that is used to directly select the screen to view.
steps.expected_result: The screen-selection drop-down menu is visible and identifiable on the VISU_MANCONTROL screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The drop-down menu is present on the VISU_MANCONTROL screen and matches the documented screen layout.
steps.failure_condition: The drop-down menu is not visible or cannot be identified on the VISU_MANCONTROL screen.

actions.label: Find drop-down menu
actions.exact_action: Locate the drop-down menu used to directly select the screen to view.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The screen-selection drop-down on the VISU_MANCONTROL screen, along with the surrounding manual control screen layout.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the drop-down menu is not available as documented.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The drop-down menu can be used to directly select the screen to view.

steps.title: Open the drop-down menu
steps.purpose: Display the available screen choices for direct navigation.
steps.instruction: Open the screen-selection drop-down menu on the VISU_MANCONTROL screen.
steps.expected_result: The drop-down menu opens and displays available screen choices.
steps.healthy_condition: The drop-down menu opens normally and presents selectable entries.
steps.failure_condition: The drop-down menu does not open or does not allow screen selection.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The drop-down menu control on the VISU_MANCONTROL screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the drop-down menu does not open.
Escalate if the drop-down menu does not allow screen selection as documented.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The drop-down menu can be used to directly select the screen to view.

steps.title: Select the desired screen
steps.purpose: Navigate directly from VISU_MANCONTROL to the target HMI screen.
steps.instruction: Select the desired screen from the available list in the drop-down menu.
steps.healthy_condition: The chosen screen opens from the VISU_MANCONTROL screen using the drop-down menu.
steps.failure_condition: The desired screen cannot be selected, the list is unavailable, or the selected screen does not open.

actions.label: Select target screen
actions.exact_action: Select the desired screen from the available list.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The VISU_MANCONTROL screen area containing the screen-selection drop-down used for direct navigation.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the desired screen cannot be selected.
Escalate if the selected screen does not open.
Note that this source section does not list the available screen names.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The drop-down menu can be used to directly select the screen to view.

success_criteria: The selected HMI screen is opened from the VISU_MANCONTROL screen using the drop-down menu.
healthy_conditions: VISU_MANCONTROL is displayed on the Operator Station HMI.
The screen-selection drop-down menu is visible on VISU_MANCONTROL.
The drop-down menu opens and allows a screen to be selected.
failure_conditions: The VISU_MANCONTROL screen is not available.
The drop-down menu is not available on the VISU_MANCONTROL screen.
The drop-down menu does not open.
The drop-down menu does not allow screen selection as documented.
The source section does not provide the list of available screen names.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the drop-down menu is not available or does not allow screen selection as documented.
Escalate if the selected screen does not open from the VISU_MANCONTROL screen.
If identification of specific selectable screen names is required, escalate because this source section does not enumerate them.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: VISU_MANCONTROL screen and its screen-selection drop-down menu.
Operator station display controls and drop-down-based screen navigation reference.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: The drop-down menu can be used to directly select the screen to view.
